full_text:
Han Xuan (Jingran)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Xuan, styledJingran, was born in Bohai. Impressed Cao Zhi despite showing lack of respect. Served Cao Pi and Rui as a civil officer. Han Xuan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Han Xuan lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
